{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323004848592382D1DF9E6AEA566F"}"},"total":5852},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7591123567616230169","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"哦！想起来了，最初上手的美食文就是《美食供应商》，但是没看完
不管怎么说，虽然有瑕疵，就是有些剧情会重复，但瑕不掩瑜，很难得了
2026.1.3，21：51，完结已读，江湖再见！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767448439,"group_id":"7311327491770027027","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"968026786893646"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7311327491770027027","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"915"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读36小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":45424,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":130929,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7582743100280537881","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怎么说呢，很久之前看了一本很好看的美食文，后来其它美食文再没入眼，直到这一本的出现，最开始是在红果短剧刷到的漫剧，一时兴起追过来了。
是真的好看！！！美食描写都把我写馋了！！！这几天就没忍住点了几次外卖，现在通宵追平，作者你得负责！！！[微笑]
简单来说就是男主获得一个美食系统，每周随机地点随机美食摆摊，系统灌输厨艺即巅峰，地点和美食也挺不搭配的[笑哭]就比如第一个美食爆辣鸡翅+肛肠科医院，确实笑喷。除了价格有些不接地气，谁叫食材是顶级的呢
全程围绕美食和食客搜捕主角摆摊地点来描写，很有趣的设定，也很好玩，记忆最深刻就是参加半马才能买、游乐园摆摊要玩十环过山车啊大摆锤什么的才能解锁美食、还有就是玩偶装卖小吃尴尬抽象的对话，反正能把人笑死[偷笑]
食客们的人物设定也很有趣，各有各的特点，比如土豪哥谢洪宇主打一个有钱任性、逗比吴逸和他妹妹、心心念念想要把主角挖过去最后被主角厨艺折服的胡林等等，或许有些角色只出现了几次，但都挺有特色的。
虽然是反复描写食客寻找男主摆摊地点，但也不觉得乏味；虽然有些剧情一看就知道后面的内容，但不会觉得无趣。
注：无CP！！！无暧昧对象！！！无莫名其妙的低俗黄色笑话！！！无古早的打脸剧情！！！
虽然有些小瑕疵，但瑕不掩瑜，也就不说了，反正能接受，不是什么毒点，三观在线","text_exts":[{"e":274,"s":271,"text":"游乐园","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B8%B8%E4%B9%90%E5%9B%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741981286AEA566F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227582743100280537881%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227311327491770027027%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B8%B8%E4%B9%90%E5%9B%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765498951,"group_id":"7311327491770027027","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我偏好无CP，养肥的还未试毒，读完的可以去瞅一眼。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9l0tgFeHe+QN0haDjTgt/E=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/04f734557a6e4292b2e21c8b1de15991~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793072&x-signature=cZ6YkM1O7AfQ%2BsazFujKagf50dI%3D","user_id":"968026786893646","user_name":"想要修道的凡人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"968026786893646","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7311327491770027027","book_info":{"abstract":"本书又名：《卖爆辣烤翅，地点竟在肛肠医院》【美食+无女主+日常+搞笑+下饭】。
不想上班的林玄，意外绑定了美食系统。 每周随机地点，随机美食。然而首周任务就让林玄傻眼。啥？在肛肠医院门口买爆辣烤翅？这是什么魔鬼任务？然而这却只是一个开始。
相亲活动卖蒜泥白肉、体育馆卖炸鸡、演唱会卖臭豆腐、参加马拉松才能点餐，高价自助餐卖炒饭、开库里南卖包子、当众念霸总台词....
事实证明，只要味道好，食客的下限也在被拉低。食客们对林老板又爱又恨。
某食客1：我痔疮好了，老板换地方了？
某食客2：林老板你做个人好不好！
某食客3：我已经不在乎林老板在哪摆摊，只要他营业，我就是最幸福的。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1d9a0f8148c6246a639a4af34b65443f","author":"冰咖半糖不加冰","author_id":"","book_id":"7311327491770027027","book_name":"老板摆摊库库跑，食客干饭猛猛追","book_short_name":"美味又相逢","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e0c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"15.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7311327561035252263","read_count":"158991","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1703864"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"827","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,美食,无女主,搞笑轻松,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5b46b6908b7e74925e0f8dfb18922624~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382128&x-signature=%2BXlassODnXSxkRYGJkBwVmxZWBA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2905348101122215","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"845"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323004848592382D1DF9E6AEA566F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读32小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":164,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":39142,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":114882,"reply_count":29,"show_pv":77021},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1765508962,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7602498125505348377","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"完结撒花🎉"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770097316,"group_id":"7311327491770027027","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3510058386983791"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7311327491770027027","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"48"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读38小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":43050,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":135672,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7562515538367955774","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"首先也是唯一要说的，抛开剧情节奏良好不谈，光是主角人设就已经秒杀很多同类型的文了，无女主无cp先放一边，林老板特别有人情味，不是那种主角获得系统就觉得自己天下无敌的（虽然这本确实天下无敌了），能出手帮一把单身家庭妈妈有独自养育孩子的能力，以及让快要倒闭的老字号的传承人能将招牌菜重现，这些都能看出林老板的感情，就是那种人的感情，我永远会为人与人之间的情感与牵挂而感动"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760787878,"group_id":"7311327491770027027","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"狂吃者终吃狂","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz/Ofd8oKrCDSf5UAPgfQP8gaONkvM93GAI1XpgVHcPo","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ef3518f32a53486bbb583af1fea72103~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796806&x-signature=5bh5pZjahs2%2F4grEmUK8Tj%2B2Yy0%3D","user_id":"3510058386983791","user_name":"代理人233"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3510058386983791","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7311327491770027027","book_info":{"abstract":"本书又名：《卖爆辣烤翅，地点竟在肛肠医院》【美食+无女主+日常+搞笑+下饭】。

某食客1：我痔疮好了，老板换地方了？
某食客2：林老板你做个人好不好！
某食客3：我已经不在乎林老板在哪摆摊，只要他营业，我就是最幸福的。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1d9a0f8148c6246a639a4af34b65443f","author":"冰咖半糖不加冰","author_id":"","book_id":"7311327491770027027","book_name":"老板摆摊库库跑，食客干饭猛猛追","book_short_name":"美味又相逢","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e0c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"15.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7311327561035252263","read_count":"158991","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1703864"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"827","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,美食,无女主,搞笑轻松,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5b46b6908b7e74925e0f8dfb18922624~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382128&x-signature=%2BXlassODnXSxkRYGJkBwVmxZWBA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2905348101122215","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"778"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323004848592382D1DF9E6AEA566F" 虽然写作手法比较简单，情节类型也稍微单薄，但作者拿捏的恰到好处，不让人厌烦。就爱看这种的打发时间，最好无限流下去，系统文没必要明白系统从哪里来，just like蜡笔小新、柯南之类连续剧。偶尔稍有创新就非常好了[微笑][微笑][微笑]","text_exts":[{"e":146,"s":142,"text":"蜡笔小新","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%9C%A1%E7%AC%94%E5%B0%8F%E6%96%B0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741981286AEA566F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227500184241039754046%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227311327491770027027%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%9C%A1%E7%AC%94%E5%B0%8F%E6%96%B0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746277609,"group_id":"7311327491770027027","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"嘿嘿","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5hZnOuQ3n1UHXMJnyW1PwSXqBdrfcFBlilbf4rXk9nr","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792384&x-signature=KUBTWgwKQKH0JBy2IKzfz54hBDI%3D","user_id":"2124733248711101","user_name":"山药饼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2124733248711101","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7311327491770027027","book_info":{"abstract":"本书又名：《卖爆辣烤翅，地点竟在肛肠医院》【美食+无女主+日常+搞笑+下饭】。
